title: Emerald Drop（绿宝石滴落）
description:
A mod about villagers and emeralds
一个关于村民和绿宝石的模组
body:
一个关于村民和绿宝石的模组，增加了一些关于村民、流浪商人和绿宝石的变化。
例如村民和流浪商人在死亡时会掉落绿宝石，当村民死亡时，会在他们所绑定的床上生成一个全新的村民。还有一些其它功能。
A mod about villagers and emeralds, adding some changes related to villagers, wandering traders, and emeralds. For example, villagers and wandering traders will drop emeralds when they die, and when a villager dies, a brand new villager will spawn on the bed they were bound to. There are also some other features.
